query:
SELECT ticker, companyName, ytdPerformance, ytdStartPrice, currentPrice 
FROM stocks 
WHERE ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != '' AND ytdPerformance != '0' AND ytdPerformance != '0.00'
ORDER BY CAST(ytdPerformance AS DECIMAL(10,2)) DESC
LIMIT 15
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT ticker, companyName, ytdPerformance, ytdStartPrice, currentPrice 
FROM stocks 
WHERE ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != '' AND ytdPerformance != '0' AND ytdPerformance != '0.00'
ORDER BY CAST(ytdPerformance AS DECIMAL(10,2)) DESC
LIMIT 15
